stemHtml: If you wish to apply for a banner towing rating, you shall have completed...

options.a: at least 150 hours of flight time and 250 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMG, after the issue of the licence.
options.b: at least 200 hours of flight time and 100 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMG, after the issue of the licence.
options.c: at least 50 hours of flight time and 100 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMG, after the issue of the licence.
options.d: at least 100 hours of flight time and 200 take-offs and landings as PIC on aeroplanes or TMG, after the issue of the licence.
